summary: Independent systems_architect review accepts the M7 UI/localization exit lead synthesis as prerequisite evidence only. The reviewed branch is process/evidence-only: actual diff paths are limited to the task JSON, thread registry, project/messages, goal-mode-state, and model-routing-state. No product code, package code, docs/decisions, content source, dependency, CI, release, server, telemetry, cloud-save, or manual-node-battle scope is changed. The synthesis correctly carries the M7 UI/localization/visual quality track without converting it into M7 Gate PASS, formal content lock approval, production art/culture approval, release readiness, or human manual acceptance. Architecture boundaries remain preserved: sim-core has no i18n/React/Pixi/Electron/DOM/Node IO coupling, UI does not own authoritative WorldState, Pixi remains render-cache/read-model presentation, and player/AI authority remains through GameCommand/query/read-model surfaces. Debug/player separation, zh-CN/zh-Hans locale handling, and platform coverage are accepted only with the limits stated in the synthesis: player-mode debug absence is covered only for tested paths, zh-* canonicalizes to zh-CN for the current supported surface and is not Traditional/regional Chinese support, and Edge/Firefox plus Windows DPI 150% remain unresolved/follow-up rows rather than passed coverage.

It explicitly does not approve formal content lock, production culture assets, human manual acceptance, release/commercial scope, telemetry/accounts/secrets, cloud save, server/multiplayer, or manual node battle reversal.

decisions.decision: Accept the lead synthesis for M7 UI/localization exit evidence only. This is not M7 Gate PASS, formal content lock acceptance, production art/cultural approval, release readiness, or product-owner manual acceptance.

Accept the actual diff scope. It changes only allowed process/task/message/state files and does not touch apps, packages, content-source, docs/decisions, gate docs, tools, CI, dependencies, release artifacts, or product code.

Accept the architecture boundary claim. No current diff changes product code, and the upstream evidence plus sim-core scan support that i18n remains outside sim-core, UI does not own authoritative WorldState, Pixi is render-cache/read-model presentation, and player/AI authority remains through GameCommand/query/read-model surfaces.

Accept debug/player separation only as scoped by the UI regression matrix and covered player-mode paths. Dev/debug affordances remain allowed where explicitly scoped and must not be reclassified as player-mode UX.

Accept the synthesis description of zh-CN/zh-Hans risk. Current support canonicalizes zh/zh-* to zh-CN for Simplified Chinese behavior and expectedLang normalization; it is not completed Traditional Chinese, regional Chinese, or culture-specific language support.

Accept Edge, Firefox, and Windows DPI 150% as unresolved/follow-up rows carried by this synthesis. They are not passed full-platform coverage and must remain visible in later content-lock or M7-exit claims unless new tooling and evidence resolve them.

No Human Gate is activated by this systems review. Formal content lock, manual human acceptance, production art/cultural choices, release/commercial decisions, telemetry/accounts/secrets, cloud-save implementation, server/multiplayer, and manual node battle reversal remain separate Human Gates if requested.

risks.summary: Edge and Firefox are not actually run in the current workspace because the Playwright matrix is Chromium-only.
risks.mitigation: Carry as unresolved/follow-up into M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 and M7-EXIT-VALIDATION-001 unless browser tooling is added and evidence rerun.

risks.summary: Windows DPI 150% is not directly exercised by the current browser or desktop smoke tooling.
risks.mitigation: Carry as unresolved/follow-up until a dedicated DPI harness exists or a Human/lead gate accepts the limitation explicitly.

risks.summary: The synthesis is close to later M7 gate material, so downstream reviewers must not infer formal content lock, human playthrough acceptance, release readiness, production art/cultural approval, or manual node battle reversal from this ACCEPT.
risks.mitigation: Keep the Human Gate list from the task JSON and synthesis intact in QA and lead closure.

risks.summary: This systems pass reran process, handoff, JSON shape, path, and boundary checks, and sampled upstream evidence. It did not rerun pnpm build:web, Storybook, e2e, desktop package, or pnpm check locally.
risks.mitigation: Use the lead synthesis and accepted upstream handoffs as recorded evidence for those heavy commands; QA may rerun selected product commands if independent verification requires it.

requested_action: Run independent QA review of the M7 UI/localization exit synthesis and this systems ACCEPT. Preserve the stated limitations: this is prerequisite evidence only, Edge/Firefox/DPI150 remain unresolved/follow-up, and no Human Gate scope is approved by this task.
